d:
Passive. Zorya's skills are powerful and have short cooldowns, but she can only use them while awake.
When a battle starts, Zorya enters a dormant state. While dormant, she remains [[invincible]] and recovers [[85]] Energy and [[7%]] max HP per second. Once her Energy is full, Zorya awakens and joins the fight.

Every time Zorya awakens, she jumps to the area with the most enemies, dealing [[300%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within 2 tiles and stunning them for [[2]]s. While awake, she is [[steadfast]] and consumes [[70]] Energy per second. When her Energy is fully depleted, she returns to her dormant state.

Zorya's Energy cannot be modified by sources other than this skill. Instead, for every [[10]] Energy she would have gained, her ATK permanently increases by [[1%]], stacking up to [[100]] times.
Increases Zorya's landing damage to [[320%]]<ATK>.
Increases Zorya's landing damage to [[340%]]<ATK>.
Increases Zorya's landing damage to [[360%]]<ATK>.
Increases Zorya's landing damage to [[380%]]<ATK>.

Passive. When Zorya awakens, her skin hardens like stone, reducing her damage taken by [[70%]]. This effect gradually fades over [[10]]s.
Active. Zorya summons arcane wings that sweep forward in a 2-tile arc, dealing [[270%]]<ATK> damage to enemies hit and knocking them down for [[2]]s.
Increases this skill's damage to [[280%]]<ATK> when actively used.
Increases this skill's damage to [[290%]]<ATK> when actively used.
Increases this skill's damage to [[300%]]<ATK> when actively used.

Passive. While awake, Zorya gains bloodlust, increasing her Life Drain by [[20]]. Whenever an enemy hero is defeated within 2 tiles, she immediately heals herself for [[30%]] of her max HP.
Active. Zorya deals [[85%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies within 2 tiles twice. Then, she launches an intimidating strike on the targets within range, dealing [[250%]]<ATK> damage, plus extra damage equal to [[15%]] of their lost HP. The extra damage cannot exceed [[150%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of the two active strikes to [[90%]]<ATK> and the base damage of the intimidating strike to [[260%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of the two active strikes to [[95%]]<ATK> and the base damage of the intimidating strike to [[270%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of the two active strikes to [[100%]]<ATK> and the base damage of the intimidating strike to [[280%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage dealt by [[9%]] during battle. If there are 2 or more enemies within 2 tiles, increases damage dealt by an extra [[3%]].
Increases damage dealt by [[12%]] during battle. If there are 2 or more enemies within 2 tiles, increases damage dealt by an extra [[4%]].
Increases damage dealt by [[15%]] during battle. If there are 2 or more enemies within 2 tiles, increases damage dealt by an extra [[5%]].

While Zorya is awake, she creates a 2-tile forcefield around herself, causing all enemies within it to lose [[80%]] movement speed and [[60]] Haste, while increasing her own Haste by [[20]]. Whenever an allied hero casts their Ultimate, the Haste bonus from the forcefield permanently increases by [[15]], stacking up to [[4]] times.
Increases the Haste granted by the forcefield to [[30]].
As long as Zorya's HP ratio remains above [[50%]], she stays [[unaffected]].
Increases the Haste granted by the forcefield to [[40]].

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 18 Crit, 12 DEF Penetration.

d: When Zorya would take a [[fatal blow]], she channels all her Energy to survive and immediately enters her dormant state. This effect can trigger once per battle.
